# particle-sim Agent Roster

Agent files to validate when running this skill.

| Agent | File |
|-------|------|
| Overlord | `.github/agents/overlord.agent.md` |
| Developer | `.github/agents/developer.agent.md` |
| Debugger | `.github/agents/debugger.agent.md` |
| Testing | `.github/agents/testing.agent.md` |
| Code Reviewer | `.github/agents/code-reviewer.agent.md` |
| C++ Expert | `.github/agents/expert-cpp.agent.md` |
| ADR Generator | `.github/agents/adr-generator.agent.md` |

## Reference Sources (check order)

1. [VS Code Agent Tools](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/agents/agent-tools) — built-in tools
2. [VS Code Agent Skills](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/agent-skills) — skill spec
3. [Awesome Copilot Learning Hub](https://awesome-copilot.github.com/learning-hub/what-are-agents-skills-instructions/) — taxonomy
4. [Awesome Copilot Skills Repository](https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot/tree/main/skills) — community skills
5. Local `.github/skills/` — custom skill definitions
6. MCP server tools (`mcp_*` prefix) — verify in `.vscode/mcp.json`
